title: Angela Hill plans to rock it 'til the wheels fall off' after UFC Macau
description: Angela Hill holds all kinds of UFC longevity records, and she's planning on adding to them.
content:
Angela Hill met the media Saturday after her win over Jingnan Xiong at UFC Fight Night 277.
Hill (19-16 MMA, 14-16 UFC) outworked former ONE Championship titleholder Xiong (19-3 MMA, 0-1 UFC) on the… [+841 chars]
de: Angela Hill will nach dem UFC Macau rocken, bis die Räder abfallen. Angela Hill hält alle Arten von UFC-Langlebigkeitsrekorden und plant, diese noch weiter auszubauen.
en: Angela Hill plans to rock it 'til the wheels fall off' after UFC Macau. Angela Hill holds all kinds of UFC longevity records, and she's planning on adding to them.
la: Angela Hill cogitat ut silex eam 'usque ad rotae defluant' post UFC Macau. Angela Hill omnia monumentorum longitudinum UFC tenet, et his additis meditatur.

title: Snail Mail and Soccer Mommy Team Up for 2026 Co-Headlining Tour
description:
Billed as the "S&M Tour" (as a play on the initials of both of their band names), the two indie rock acts will join forces on the road this fall.
Snail Mail and Soccer Mommy Team Up for 2026 Co-Headlining Tour
Paolo Ragusa
content:
Indie lovers, rejoice: Snail Mail and Soccer Mommy are going on tour together.
Billed as the “S&M Tour” (as a play on their band name initials), the pair of indie rock acts, led respectively by … [+2081 chars]
de:
Snail Mail und Soccer Mommy schließen sich für die Co-Headliner-Tour 2026 zusammen. Unter dem Namen „S&M Tour“ (als Anspielung auf die Initialen ihrer beiden Bandnamen) werden die beiden Indie-Rock-Acts diesen Herbst gemeinsam auf Tour gehen.
Snail Mail und Soccer Mommy schließen sich für die Co-Headliner-Tour 2026 zusammen
Paolo Ragusa
en:
Snail Mail and Soccer Mommy Team Up for 2026 Co-Headlining Tour. Billed as the "S&M Tour" (as a play on the initials of both of their band names), the two indie rock acts will join forces on the road this fall.
Snail Mail and Soccer Mommy Team Up for 2026 Co-Headlining Tour
Paolo Ragusa
la:
Cochlea Mail et Soccus mammam Team Sursum pro MMXXVI Co-Headlining Tour. Occisus ut "S&M Tour" (sicut fabula de initiis utriusque cohortis nominum), duae indicis petrae acta copias coniungent in itinere ruinae.
Cochlea Mail et Morbi mammam Team Sursum pro MMXXVI Co-Headlining Tour
Paulus de Ragusio
